programme.title: These Woods Are Haunted
programme.sub-title: No One's Ever Going to See Me Again and Something Very Powerful
programme.desc: (M) A boy and his brothers are terrorized by a humanoid creature trying to break into their home. A trio of ghost hunters encounters a ghostly figure on a remote island in Michigan.

programme.title: Seatbelt Psychic
programme.sub-title: We Made a Believer out of Him
programme.desc: 9Mystery & Paranormal provides supernatural documentaries, unexplained phenomena, and mystery-focused entertainment programming.

programme.title: Mystery & Paranormal Show
programme.desc: 9Mystery & Paranormal provides supernatural documentaries, unexplained phenomena, and mystery-focused entertainment programming.

programme.title: Expedition Bigfoot
programme.desc: (M) Russell gets closer to his quarry than ever before but a chilling new revelation about the creature's psychic abilities may complicate the investigation.

programme.title: Theresa Caputo: Raising Spirits
